message:
fix(release): pin frankensqlite to 9d045a7 (all crates aligned)

Comprehensive fix: pushed 35 source files to frankensqlite ensuring
all crates compile consistently. Previous revisions had cross-crate
type mismatches from concurrent agent development.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -35,7 +35,7 @@ notify = "*"
